full_text:
Cao Jie (Zhongyong) жӣ№е–Ҳ (д»ІйӣҚ)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Jie (жӣ№е–Ҳ), styledZhongyong (д»ІйӣҚ). Son of Cao Pi. Died at two months old, Cao Zhi wrote a lament for Cao Pi. Cao Jie was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
